info.description: RAG pipeline over Banner release notes and Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs), backed by Azure OpenAI and Azure Cognitive Search.
info.title: go-omnivore-rag API

post.summary: Ask a question against Banner release notes

get.summary: List documents in Azure Blob Storage

post.summary: Download blobs from Azure Storage and ingest them
Ingest Banner release note PDFs into the search index
Ask a question scoped to a specific Banner module
post.description: Supported module values: finance, student, hr, financial-aid, ar, general

post.summary: Ask a question against Banner Student user guide
Analyse how a Banner release change affects Student user guide procedures
Ingest Banner Student user guide PDFs into the search index
Look up a Banner Student concept or feature definition

Summarize required actions for a Banner release
Summarize breaking changes in a Banner release
Summarize what changed in a Banner release
Summarize compatibility notes for a Banner release
Full summary across all topics for a Banner release
Route a student message to Banner or SOP backend based on intent/source

Analyze the sentiment of a student message

post.summary: Create the Azure Search index
Ask a question against SOPs

confidence.description: Confidence score from sources[0].score (0–1); 0.0 if no sources returned

source_type.description: Optional — narrows to a specific doc type

intent.description: Optional intent hint: RegistrationBanner | FinanceBanner | TranscriptSop | HoldsSop | ReleaseSummary | General

source.description: Optional routing override: general | student | finance | sop | auto

intent.description: One of RegistrationBanner | FinanceBanner | TranscriptSop | HoldsSop | ReleaseSummary | General
